belief: current state of the work, in one sentence (what is true right now about this code path)
hypothesis_id: led-XXXX or null - the ledger entry this change tests/rests on
next_change: the single code change about to be made, toward this one criterion
prediction: what the cheap oracle will show AFTER the change - name the oracle + the observable transition (e.g. red->green, 41/41, exit 0)
expected_invariant: the single testable assertion the change must make true - no 'should/correctly/works'
